app.name: The Cube
app.maintenanceMessage: The Cube is temporarily under maintenance. Please try again later.
app.blockedMessage: This version of The Cube is no longer supported. Please install the official version.

update.title: The Cube 2.0.27 is ready
update.message: Install the latest version for player stability, server switching, downloads, profiles, Kids mode, and TV navigation improvements.
releaseNotes: Removed the Android Cast button crash path
Added player server switching during loading and error states
Added StreamIMDB as an isolated web playback option
Improved subtitles with all-language subtitle-proxy support and local caching
Added download pause and resume controls
Improved Firebase signup with nickname, password confirmation, reset, and email verification
Updated Kids profile logo, badge, and slower Kids banner rotation
Improved profile, library, playlist, and TV focus behavior

items.title: The Cube 2.0.27
items.message: Player controls, downloads, profiles, Kids mode, and TV navigation have been improved.

items.title: Support The Cube
items.message: Support is optional and helps development. Third-party servers may still go down or return errors.
